ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle (e.g., VBCI-E, M75) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., APC, IFV, MBT) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "length_m" REAL /* Length of the vehicle in meters */,
  "width_m" REAL /* Width of the vehicle in meters */,
  "height_m" REAL /* Height of the vehicle in meters */,
  "ground_clearance_cm" INTEGER /* Ground clearance of the vehicle in centimeters */,
  "weight_tonnes" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in tonnes */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., diesel, gasoline) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "cruise_speed_kph" REAL /* Cruise speed of the vehicle in kilometers per hour */,
  "max_range_km" REAL /* Maximum range of the vehicle in kilometers */,
  "crew_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum crew capacity */,
  "armor_type" TEXT /* Type of armor (e.g., steel, composite) */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., weight, ground clearance) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., cm, m, km) */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle associated with the modification */,
  "modification_name" TEXT /* Name of the modification (e.g., armor upgrade, engine swap) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modification */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was made */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the modification was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the modification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_modifications_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle associated with the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, procurement officer, admin) */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view vehicle specs, edit vehicle specs) */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battlefield_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment entry */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., desert, urban, forest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)
